name: Kbd
description: Decorative element used to represent keyboard keys and shortcuts.

variant.description: Visual variant used to match surrounding background and emphasis.

slots.children: Keyboard key text or short key combinations.

keyboard: When nested in interactive controls, keyboard handling is owned by the parent control
aria: Screen readers announce Kbd content as plain text
Use descriptive surrounding text to explain the action represented by each key
Use explicit separators such as '+' for multi-key shortcuts
